content.json:
# Hybrid Latency Lab
Chatty vs chunky workloads over a vWAN-connected hybrid environment. Each run carries a `run_id` you can use to slice every chart below.

content.query:
traces
| where message startswith "DONE workload="
| extend workload = extract("workload=([^ ]+)", 1, message),
         run_id = extract("run_id=([^ ]+)", 1, message),
         items = toint(extract("items=([0-9]+)", 1, message)),
         roundtrips = toint(extract("roundtrips=([0-9]+)", 1, message)),
         duration_ms = tolong(extract("duration_ms=([0-9]+)", 1, message))
| project timestamp, workload, run_id, items, roundtrips, duration_ms
| order by timestamp desc
content.title: Run summary (per workload)

content.query:
traces
| where message startswith "DONE workload="
| extend workload = extract("workload=([^ ]+)", 1, message),
         duration_ms = tolong(extract("duration_ms=([0-9]+)", 1, message)),
         roundtrips = toint(extract("roundtrips=([0-9]+)", 1, message))
| summarize avg_dur_ms = avg(duration_ms), avg_rt = avg(roundtrips) by workload
| extend ms_per_roundtrip = avg_dur_ms / avg_rt
content.title: Cost per round-trip (ms)

content.query:
dependencies
| where operation_Name startswith "BatchRun-"
| extend workload = iif(operation_Name startswith "BatchRun-chatty", "chatty", "chunky")
| summarize roundtrips = count() by bin(timestamp, 1s), workload
| render timechart
content.title: Round-trips over time

content.query:
NWConnectionMonitorTestResult
| summarize avg_rtt_ms = avg(AvgRoundTripTimeMs), loss = avg(ChecksFailedPercent) by bin(TimeGenerated, 1m), DestinationName
| render timechart
content.title: ExpressRoute / WAN RTT (Connection Monitor)
